Dashboard.description: Monitor your skills, credits, MCP keys, recent usage, and payment orders from one place.
Dashboard.billingDescription: Manage your credit balance and transaction history.
Dashboard.mcpCallsDescription: All recorded OceanSkill MCP invocations for this account.
Dashboard.recentUsageDescription: Your latest MCP skill requests and their billing status.
Dashboard.emptyUsage: No usage has been recorded yet.
Dashboard.mcpKeysDescription: Manage and configure MCP access keys so your agents can interact safely with OceanSkill.
Dashboard.keyNamePlaceholder: Enter key name (for example: Agent Alpha)
Dashboard.newKeyWarning: Copy this key now. You will not be able to see the full secret again.
Dashboard.securityDescription: Your keys are protected by server-side verification and owner-scoped database access.
Dashboard.lowLatencyDescription: Optimized MCP access keeps agent calls fast and predictable.
Dashboard.auditLogDescription: Track usage history for every key through account usage events.
Dashboard.usageDescription: Track and analyze how your AI skills are being used. Data is updated from Supabase usage events.
Dashboard.usagePaginationHint: Showing the latest events out of {total} total calls.
Dashboard.usageTrendDescription: API traffic over the last 7 days
